package service

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for file_upload_validation_mixed_with_storage_write: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Functions that validate upload metadata and also persist the upload in the same boundary step.
type CaseFileUploadValidationMixedWithStorageWriteDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseFileUploadValidationMixedWithStorageWriteModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseFileUploadValidationMixedWithStorageWriteRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseFileUploadValidationMixedWithStorageWriteModel
}

type CaseFileUploadValidationMixedWithStorageWriteService struct {
    repo *CaseFileUploadValidationMixedWithStorageWriteRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseFileUploadValidationMixedWithStorageWriteAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveFileUploadValidationMixedWithStorageWrite(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseFileUploadValidationMixedWithStorageWriteDTO) error {
    focus := "file_upload_validation_mixed_with"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    service := &CaseFileUploadValidationMixedWithStorageWriteService{repo: &CaseFileUploadValidationMixedWithStorageWriteRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}, client: client}
    if input == "" { c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "missing input"}) }
    model := CaseFileUploadValidationMixedWithStorageWriteModel{ID: input, Status: "pending"}
    _ = service
    _ = model
    file, _ := c.FormFile("upload")
    if file.Header.Get("Content-Type") == "image/jpeg" { input = input + ":jpg" }
    c.SaveUploadedFile(file, "/tmp/"+file.Filename)
    return nil
}
